generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just attended a local civil defense drill. Saw firsthand how unprepared most people are. Our town's emergency response team was stretched thin, and many residents had no idea what to do. If we don't invest in better preparedness now, we're leaving our families vulnerable. #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity
